get.description:
Health check endpoint for Cloud Run.
No rate limiting to ensure health checks always succeed.

post.description:
Step 1 of OTP login/signup.
Creates the account if it doesn't exist, then emails a 6-digit code.
Always returns 200 to avoid leaking whether the email is registered.

Step 2 of OTP login/signup.
Validates the 6-digit code and issues a JWT session cookie.

get.description: Get information about the knowledge base index and namespace used by the similaritySearch endpoint.

post.description:
Upload a single file to Google Cloud Storage and queue it for async processing.
The file will be processed (chunked and uploaded to Pinecone) asynchronously.

delete.description: Delete all vectors in a specified namespace from the Pinecone index.

post.description: Perform similarity search using vector embeddings.
Create a new chat session

get.description: Get all sessions for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by agent_id

schema.title: Response Get Sessions Api Chat Sessions Sessions Get

get.description: Get a specific session by session_id with its messages

delete.description: Delete a session and all its messages
Clear all messages from a session without deleting the session itself

get.description:
Retrieve all stored payment methods for the authenticated user.
Returns payment methods associated with the user's Stripe customer ID.

post.description:
Add a payment method to the authenticated user's Stripe customer.
If the user doesn't have a Stripe customer ID, creates one first.

delete.description:
Delete a payment method for the authenticated user.
Verifies that the payment method belongs to the user's Stripe customer before deletion.

get.description:
List all credentials for the authenticated user.
Returns metadata only (no decrypted secrets).

schema.title: Response List Credentials Api Credentials  Get

post.description:
Create a new credential (API key) for a third-party service.
The API key will be encrypted before storage.

LEGACY ENDPOINT: For simple API key storage.
For flexible credentials (DB connections, OAuth, etc.), use POST /flexible

get.description:
Get a specific credential by ID, including the decrypted API key.
Only returns credentials belonging to the authenticated user.

LEGACY ENDPOINT: Returns api_key field for backward compatibility.
For full credential data (DB connections, etc.), use GET /{id}/full

put.description:
Update an existing credential's API key.

LEGACY ENDPOINT: For simple API key updates.
For flexible credentials, use PUT /{id}/full

delete.description: Delete a credential belonging to the authenticated user.

get.description:
Get a credential by service/provider type (first match), including the decrypted API key.

LEGACY ENDPOINT: Returns api_key field for backward compatibility.
For full credential data, use GET /service/{service_name}/full
Get a specific credential with full decrypted data structure.

put.description: Update a credential with full flexible data structure.

get.description: Get a credential by service/provider type (first match) with full decrypted data.
List all Pinecone indexes associated with the caller's Pinecone API key.

schema.title: Response List Indexes Api Vector Stores Indexes Get

post.description:
Create a new Pinecone index.

Note: Index creation is asynchronous. The index may take some time to be ready.

get.description: List all namespaces within a specific Pinecone index.

schema.title: Response List Namespaces Api Vector Stores Indexes  Index Name  Namespaces Get

post.description:
Create a new namespace within a specific Pinecone index.

This endpoint creates the namespace by upserting a temporary dummy vector
(which is immediately deleted) to force Pinecone to initialize the namespace.
If the namespace already exists, it returns the existing namespace info.

delete.description:
Delete **all** vectors in a specific namespace of a Pinecone index.

Uses the caller's stored Pinecone API key and logs the operation to the
vector DB ingestion log with ``operation_type='DELETE'``.

parameters.name: operation_type

schema.description: Filter by operation type (INGEST, DELETE, UPDATE)
schema.title: Operation Type

parameters.description: Filter by operation type (INGEST, DELETE, UPDATE)

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by status (SUCCESS, FAILED, PARTIAL, PENDING)
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by status (SUCCESS, FAILED, PARTIAL, PENDING)

parameters.name: start_date

schema.description: Filter logs created after this date (ISO format)
schema.title: Start Date

parameters.description: Filter logs created after this date (ISO format)

parameters.name: end_date

schema.description: Filter logs created before this date (ISO format)
schema.title: End Date

parameters.description: Filter logs created before this date (ISO format)

get.description:
List ingestion logs for the authenticated user with optional filtering.

Supports filtering by:
- index_name: Filter by specific index
- namespace: Filter by namespace
- operation_type: INGEST, DELETE, or UPDATE
- status: SUCCESS, FAILED, PARTIAL, or PENDING
- provider: Filter by provider (e.g., 'pinecone')
- batch_number: Filter by batch UUID
- start_date/end_date: Filter by date range

Results are paginated and ordered by created_at descending (newest first).

parameters.name: operation_type

schema.description: Filter by operation type (INGEST, DELETE, UPDATE)
schema.title: Operation Type

parameters.description: Filter by operation type (INGEST, DELETE, UPDATE)

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by status (SUCCESS, FAILED, PARTIAL, PENDING)
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by status (SUCCESS, FAILED, PARTIAL, PENDING)

parameters.name: start_date

schema.description: Filter logs created after this date (ISO format)
schema.title: Start Date

parameters.description: Filter logs created after this date (ISO format)

parameters.name: end_date

schema.description: Filter logs created before this date (ISO format)
schema.title: End Date

parameters.description: Filter logs created before this date (ISO format)

get.description:
Get a specific ingestion log entry by ID.
Only returns logs belonging to the authenticated user.

Get summary statistics for ingestion logs.
Returns aggregated counts and totals for the authenticated user's logs.

schema.title: Response Get Ingestion Logs Summary Api Vector Stores Ingestion Logs Stats Summary Get

post.description:
Upload a CSV file to Google Cloud Storage and queue it for async processing.
The file will be processed (chunked and uploaded to Pinecone) asynchronously via cloud function.

Creates an ingestion log entry with PENDING status that will be updated when processing completes.

Upload a text file (.txt or .md) to Google Cloud Storage and queue it for async processing.
The file will be processed (chunked and uploaded to Pinecone) asynchronously via cloud function.

Creates an ingestion log entry with PENDING status that will be updated when processing completes.

get.description:
List all agents the authenticated user can access.

This includes agents the user owns as well as agents shared with
them via access groups.  Each response item includes ``is_owner``
so the UI can distinguish owned vs. shared agents.

schema.title: Response List Agents Api Agents  Get

get.description:
Get a specific agent by ID.

Returns agents the authenticated user owns **or** has access to via
an access group.  Returns 404 when the agent does not exist or the
user has no access (to avoid leaking existence).

put.description:
Update an agent by ID (name and/or config).
Config must be version 4 if provided.
Only allows updating agents belonging to the authenticated user.

delete.description:
Delete an agent by ID.
Only allows deleting agents belonging to the authenticated user.

post.description:
Grant an access group permission to use this agent.

Only the agent owner can create grants.  For v1 the caller must also
own the access group.

get.description: List all access groups that have been granted access to this agent. Agent owner only.

schema.title: Response List Grants Api Agents  Agent Id  Access Grants Get

delete.description: Revoke an access group's permission to use this agent. Agent owner only.

get.description:
List all API keys for the authenticated account.
Only shows key prefix, never the full key.

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Api Api Keys  Get

post.description:
Create a new API key. The full key is returned only once.
You must be authenticated via JWT to create API keys.

delete.description: Revoke an API key. Only the owner can revoke.

get.description:
Get the authenticated user's account details.
Returns account info excluding sensitive fields (password, reset_token).

put.description:
Update the authenticated user's account.

Updatable fields:
- email: The account email address
- newsletter_subscribed: Newsletter subscription preference

Note: Password changes should use the /auth/reset-password flow.

delete.description:
Delete the authenticated user's account.

This permanently deletes the account and all associated data.
Related records (credentials, api_keys, leads) are cascade deleted.

After deletion, the JWT cookie is cleared.

get.description:
List all prompts for the authenticated user.

Returns prompts ordered by most recently updated first.

schema.title: Response List Prompts Api Prompts  Get

post.description:
Create a new prompt.

The prompt is saved to the database and then embedded + upserted into
Pinecone (``prompts`` namespace) for similarity search.

get.description:
Get a specific prompt by ID.

Only returns prompts that belong to the authenticated user.

put.description:
Update an existing prompt.

If content, name, or description changed the vector in Pinecone is
re-embedded and upserted so search stays in sync.

delete.description: Delete a prompt and its corresponding Pinecone vector.

get.description: List access groups the authenticated user owns **or** is a member of.

schema.title: Response List Access Groups Api Access Groups  Get

post.description: Create a new access group. The authenticated user becomes the owner.

get.description:
Get a specific access group.

Accessible by the group owner or any member.

patch.description: Update an access group's name. Owner only.

delete.description: Delete an access group. Owner only. Cascades members and grants.

post.description:
Add an account to the access group by email. Owner only.

Validates that:
- The group exists and caller is the owner.
- The target account exists.
- The target is not already a member.

get.description:
List all members of an access group.

Accessible by the group owner or any member of the group.

schema.title: Response List Members Api Access Groups  Group Id  Members Get

delete.description: Remove a member from the access group. Owner only.

get.description:
List all contacts for the authenticated user.

Supports optional filtering by ?status= and full-text ?search= over
name, email, and company.

schema.title: Response List Contacts Api Contacts  Get

get.description: Return events for a contact ordered most-recent first.

schema.title: Response List Contact Events Api Contacts  Contact Id  Events  Get
Response List Career Timeline Api Contacts  Contact Id  Career Timeline  Get

get.description: List all contact lists for the authenticated account.

schema.title: Response List Contact Lists Api Contact Lists  Get

get.description: List all contacts in a given contact list.

schema.title: Response List Members Api Contact Lists  List Id  Members  Get

post.description: Add a single contact to a contact list.
Add multiple contacts to a list in one call, skipping duplicates.

delete.description: Remove a contact from a contact list.

get.description:
Return tool approval requests for the authenticated account.

Defaults to showing only pending requests; pass ?status=all to see all.
Expired-but-still-pending records are automatically marked expired.

schema.title: Response List Tool Approvals Api Tool Approvals  Get

post.description:
Approve and immediately execute a pending tool action.

An optional JSON body may supply overrides for to_email / subject / body,
allowing the user to edit the agent-composed email before sending.
Reject a pending tool action — no execution occurs.

Send a preview of a pending HTML email to the currently logged-in user.

The approval is NOT marked as approved — it stays pending so the user
can still approve (sending to the real recipient) or reject afterwards.
Record a single email event.

get.description:
List email events for the authenticated account with optional filters.

Designed for dashboard queries — filter by event type, contact, campaign,
provider, date range, or recipient address.

schema.title: Response List Email Events Api Email Events  Get

post.description:
Record multiple email events in a single request.
Useful for ingesting batched SNS/SES webhook notifications.
All events are written atomically — if any fail the whole batch is rolled back.

schema.title: Response Bulk Create Email Events Api Email Events Bulk Post

get.description:
Return aggregated event counts for the authenticated account.
Supports the same date/campaign/approval/credential filters as the list endpoint.
Useful for summary cards on the email metrics dashboard.

patch.description:
Update the event_metadata of an email event.
Use this to enrich an event with additional context after the fact
(e.g. attaching a bounce subtype received from a delayed webhook).

schema.title: Response List Email Templates Api Email Templates  Get

post.description:
Send a campaign's email template to every contact in its linked list.

Generates a unique tracking_id per contact so rating and open events
can be correlated back to the specific contact-campaign pair.

get.description: List all ratings for a campaign with optional filters.

schema.title: Response List Campaign Ratings Api Email Campaigns  Campaign Id  Ratings Get

get.description: Return aggregated rating statistics for a campaign.
Get a single rating by ID within a campaign.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by campaign status (draft, active, paused, completed)
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by campaign status (draft, active, paused, completed)

schema.title: Response List Email Campaigns Api Email Campaigns  Get

get.description: Record an email open event and return a 1x1 transparent GIF.
Record a star-rating click from an email and show a thank-you page.

ServiceName.title: ServiceName
ServiceName.description:
Supported API service names for storing credentials.

This enum explicitly defines which third-party services are supported
by the Kalygo platform. New services can be added as needed.

Note: Adding a new value here requires a corresponding Alembic migration
to add the value to the PostgreSQL enum type.

name.title: Name
name.description: Token name used in the template, e.g. 'first_name'

label.title: Label
label.description: Human-readable label shown in the UI

required.title: Required
required.description: Whether a non-empty value must be supplied at send time

TemplateVariable.title: TemplateVariable
TemplateVariable.description: Descriptor for a single variable slot in a template.
